references.role: global Licorn kitchen identity for all Seedance segments
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen surfaces, island, material identity, lighting, and final hero-shot context. Do not copy exact framing when a macro shot is required.

references.role: overhead island framing for sauce smears, assembly, rows, saucing, cheese, and toppings
references.prompt: Use only for overhead food action on the island. Keep visible hands and macro food textures dominant.

references.role: induction stovetop close-up for saucepan sauce and filling saute shots
references.prompt: Use for pan and saucepan close-ups on induction. Do not show flames or burner glow.

references.role: already-open oven context for baking dish slide-in
references.prompt: Use for the oven insertion context only. The oven door must already be open and not manipulated.

references.role: baked cheese reveal angle
references.prompt: Use for close baked reveal only: bubbling cheese, steam, and crisp tortilla edges.

references.role: Licorn character identity and visible hands continuity
references.prompt: Use for character identity, especially visible hands. Do not re-describe the character from scratch.

references.role: satisfied final hero expression guidance
references.prompt: Use only for the final satisfied expression; no exaggerated acting, no speaking.

references.role: visible hands for overhead food actions
references.prompt: Use for top-down sauce, filling, rolling, cheese, and topping actions where hands must be visible.

references.role: oven handling and final plate presentation pose
references.prompt: Use for three-quarter character body positioning during oven handling and the final plate presentation.

references.role: saucepan shape for homemade red enchilada sauce
references.prompt: Use only as the saucepan object reference for roux, whisking, and simmering shots.

references.role: whisk shape for spice roux and stock smoothing
references.prompt: Use only as the whisk object reference; keep the whisk visibly held by Licorn hands.

references.role: spoon for sauce spreading, filling placement, sour cream, and optional final touch
references.prompt: Use as spoon shape only. Avoid floating spoon actions by requiring visible hands.

references.role: serving spatula for the final cheese-pull lift
references.prompt: Use as serving spatula shape only for lifting one enchilada from the pan.

references.role: rectangular baking dish for rolled enchiladas
references.prompt: Use the rectangular dish shape to preserve the 9 x 13-inch pan feel and row geometry.

references.role: cutting board shape for diced chicken and chopped topping references
references.prompt: Use only as an object reference when diced chicken or chopped toppings need a prep surface.

references.role: chef knife shape for chopped ingredient context
references.prompt: Use as object shape only; do not add extra knife-work shots unless explicitly prompted.

references.role: optional pan utensil for filling handling
references.prompt: Use only if a pan-handling utensil appears in the filling segment.

references.role: finished homemade red enchilada sauce texture target
references.prompt: Generate a macro overhead reference of smooth tomato-free red enchilada sauce in a spoon and shallow saucepan: deep brick-red chili-spice color, glossy medium-thick viscosity, coating the back of a spoon with a clean drip edge, no tomato chunks, no salsa texture, no garnish.

references.role: unbaked rolled enchilada row topology
references.prompt: Generate an overhead reference of eight large flour-tortilla chicken enchiladas rolled seam-side down in a rectangular baking dish, neat parallel rounded cylinders, lightly covered with glossy red enchilada sauce and shredded Mexican-blend cheese. Rolls must remain distinct; not a flat casserole or lasagna.

references.role: baked bubbling enchilada pan target state
references.prompt: Generate a close reference of baked chicken enchiladas in a rectangular dish: melted Mexican-blend cheese bubbling and lightly blistered, brick-red sauce visible between rounded tortilla ridges, slightly crisp tortilla tips at the edges, light steam, not charred, not flat.

references.role: final plated enchilada target state with toppings
references.prompt: Generate a final plated chicken enchilada in the Licorn kitchen context: one saucy red enchilada with melted cheese, cilantro, diced avocado, diced red onion, sour cream ribbon, crumbled cotija, light steam, glossy sauce, appetizing but not messy, no bite taken, no text.
